7 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
8 
9 #include <boost/bind.hpp>
10 
11 #include <algorithm>
12 
13 #include "GraphBuilder.h"
14 
15 /* Author : dipietrd at Thu Nov 15 11:28:20 2007
16  * Generated by createNew
17  */
18 
19 #if (ARCANE_VERSION <= 30003)
20 void GraphBuilder::addLinkDescriptor(const LinkDescriptor& ld) {
21  m_descriptors.insert(ld);
22 }
23 
25 
26 #if (ARCANE_VERSION <= 30003)
27 void GraphBuilder::addLink(const LinkData& L) {
28  descriptor_set::iterator i = std::find_if(m_descriptors.begin(),
29  m_descriptors.end(),
30  boost::bind<bool>(LinkDescriptorComparator::IdEqualTo(), _1, L.getDescriptorUniqueId()));
31  if(i == m_descriptors.end()) // The descriptor had not been defined
32  throw(Error("Descriptor not defined while inserting link"));
33  else // The descriptor had been defined
34  m_links[L.getDescriptorUniqueId()].push_back(L);
35 }
36 #endif
38 #if (ARCANE_VERSION<11602)
39 void GraphBuilder::build(Arcane::mesh::DynamicGraph* graph) {
40 #else
41 void GraphBuilder::build(Arcane::IGraph* graph) {
42 #endif
43  // Compute array size
44  Integer n_item_types = 0;
45  for(descriptor_set::iterator i = m_descriptors.begin(); i != m_descriptors.end(); i++)
46  n_item_types += i->getItemNumber();
47  Integer headline_size = 1 + m_descriptors.size() + n_item_types;
48 
49  Integer body_size = 1 + 2 * m_links.size();
50  for(descriptor2link_map::iterator i = m_links.begin(); i != m_links.end(); i++) {
51  const descriptor_set::iterator descriptor_it = find_if(m_descriptors.begin(),
52  m_descriptors.end(),
53  boost::bind<bool>(LinkDescriptorComparator::IdEqualTo(), _1, i->first));
54  const link_list& links = i->second;
55  body_size += descriptor_it->getItemNumber() * links.size();
56  }
57  Int64SharedArray graph_info(headline_size + body_size);
58  std::cout << "Graph info table size = " << headline_size + body_size;
59 
60  // Headline
61  graph_info[0] = m_descriptors.size(); // The number of descriptors
62  Integer index = 1;
63  for(descriptor_set::const_iterator i = m_descriptors.begin(); i != m_descriptors.end(); i++) {
64  const LinkDescriptor& ld = *i;
65  graph_info[index++] = ld.getItemNumber();
66  for(LinkDescriptor::item_type_vector::const_iterator j = ld.item_types.begin(); j != ld.item_types.end(); j++) {
67  graph_info[index++] = *j;
68  }
69  }
70 
71  // Body
72  graph_info[index++] = m_descriptors.size(); // The number of link groups (equal to the number of descriptors)
73  for(descriptor_set::const_iterator i = m_descriptors.begin(); i != m_descriptors.end(); i++) {
74  Integer descriptor_uid = i->uniqueId();
75  const link_list& links = m_links[descriptor_uid];
76 
77  graph_info[index++] = links.size(); // The number of links in the group
78  graph_info[index++] = descriptor_uid; // The corresponding descriptor
79 
80  for(link_list::const_iterator iL = links.begin(); iL != links.end(); iL++) {
81  for(LinkData::item_uid_vector::const_iterator j = iL->item_uids.begin(); j != iL->item_uids.end(); j++)
82  graph_info[index++] = *j;
83  }
84  }
85 }
86 #endif
87
